---
name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve the theme
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the visual styling issue is (e.g., text is unreadable, borders are too bright on a specific page, a style overrides a button color).

**Feishu/Lark Product Context**
Which Feishu/Lark module does this happen in? (e.g., Base, Docs, Wiki, Spreadsheets)

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem. (Before/after screenshots are highly appreciated!)

**Environment Info:**
 - OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows]
 - Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari, Edge]
 - Userscript Manager: [e.g. Tampermonkey v5.0, Violentmonkey]
 - MellowLark version: [e.g. v0.3.0]
 - Theme Active: [e.g. Paper, Mint, Silver]

**Additional Context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
